channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tom Brady shares heartfelt message for ex-Patriots teammate Randy Moss as he battles health challenge
item.description: As Randy Moss steps away from his duties with ESPN to battle "something internally," many support messages have poured in, including from Tom Brady during FOX NFL Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SHR closure leads to a seat shakeup in NASCAR. A look at who is driving where in 2025
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — There won't be a Stewart-Haas Racing in NASCAR next season now that Hall of Famer Tony Stewart has left the series and the four-car organization he co-owned with Formula 1 team owner Gene Haas.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dillon Gabriel, Travis Hunter, Ashton Jeanty, Cam Ward are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night. The Heisman has been given to the nation’s most outstanding college football player since 1935.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High school football rankings Week 16, 2024: Bay Area News Group Top 25
item.description: High school football rankings Week 16, 2024: Where teams stand before state championship games this week.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Cowboys cheerleader dating Bengals kicker Cade York has sweet reaction after successful extra point attempt
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cheerleader Zoe Dale had a sweet reaction to her boyfriend, Cincinnati Bengals kicker Cade York, after his first extra point attempt during Monday night's win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Burrow, Chase lift Bengals after botched blocked punt by Cowboys in 27-20 Cincinnati victory
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals finally got a break. The Dallas Cowboys had flashbacks to one of the most painful moments in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Micah Parsons aches after botched blocked punt costs Cowboys in loss to Bengals
item.description: Micah Parsons rocked back and forth on the bench in agony after Cincinnati’s winning touchdown that followed a botched blocked punt from his Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Schuyler Dixon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hall has goal and assist, Soderblom stops 29 shots as Blackhawks beat Rangers 2-1
item.description: Taylor Hall had a goal and an assist, Arvid Soderblom stopped 29 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the New York Rangers 2-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Reports: White Sox sign former Cub Mike Tauchman
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Free agent outfielder Mike Tauchman is trading the North Side for the South Side, according to multiple reports. MLB.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit for opener in Japan, but not be on the mound
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit when the reigning World Series champions open their season in Japan against the Chicago Cubs on March 18 and 19.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Soto's record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets reverberates through Major League Baseball
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Shortly after striking a record $765 million, 15-year contract for Juan Soto with the New York Mets, agent Scott Boras walked into Nick & Sam's, a restaurant near the winter meetings hotel, with about a dozen of his staff.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM and STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Auburn coach Harsin linked to Cal’s offensive coordinator job
item.description: Harsin, who was fired amid controversy at Auburn two years ago, reportedly close to joining Wilcox's staff with the Cal Bears.
item.dc:creator: Laurence Miedema, The Mercury News

item.title: Mike Tyson faces $1.5 million lawsuit over alleged contract violation in order to fight Jake Paul
item.description: Mike Tyson is being sued by a marketing company that seeks more than $1.5 million after he allegedly broke a promotional contract with them to fight Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys set to host Bengals under open roof after falling debris thwarted that plan against Texans
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys opened without incident and will stay that way for a Monday night meeting with the Cincinnati Bengals. It was to be the first game with the roof open at AT&T Stadium since Oct. 30, 2022, a 49-29 Dallas victory over Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tennessee grabs No. 1 in AP Top 25 after shakeup; No. 3 Iowa State has highest ranking since 1950s
item.description: Tennessee is the new No. 1 in men's college basketball after a massive shakeup in the AP Top 25. The Vols received 58 first-place votes from a 62-person media panel Monday to reach No. 1 for the first time since the 2018-19 season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dave Parker and Dick Allen elected to baseball's Hall of Fame
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Having waited for the call from Cooperstown for nearly three decades, Dave Parker burst into tears Sunday when he was elected to baseball’s Hall of Fame along with the late Dick Allen. “Yeah, I cried,” Parker said after receiving the news from Hall chair Jane Forbes Clark.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matchup set for 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: The 45th annual DIRECTV Holiday Bowl will feature Syracuse vs. Washington State on December 27, 2024, at Snapdragon Stadium in San Diego, Sports San Diego announced Sunday. The game will be broadcast live on FOX.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: A hamstring injury silenced George Pickens. His Steelers teammates picked up the slack vs. Browns
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — A hamstring injury managed to do the one thing to George Pickens that nobody else has during the Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver's three eventful years in the NFL, Pickens included. It kept him quiet. Temporarily anyway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saints QB Derek Carr injures left hand on dive in 4th quarter of win over Giants
item.description: New Orleans Saints quarterback Derek Carr injured his left hand late in the fourth quarter of Sunday's 14-11 victory over the New York Giants when he went airborne while trying for a first down and crashed to the turf.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Ten wins playoff selection derby, followed by SEC despite notable Alabama omission
item.description: College football's conference shakeup left concerns about two super conferences dominating the playoff field. They weren't totally unfounded or 100% borne out. The Big Ten, not the Southeastern Conference, was the biggest winner Sunday. The ACC scored, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks starting goaltender Petr Mrazek placed on injured reserve with groin injury
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks placed goaltender Petr Mrazek on injured reserve on Sunday with a left groin injury. Mrazek was replaced by Arvid Soderblom in the first period of Saturday's 4-2 loss to Winnipeg. The 32-year-old Mrazek is 7-11-1 with a 2.83 goals-against average and .
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: We only know 1 of the teams in the upcoming Rose Bowl game so far. Here's why
item.description: We now know the matchup of college football's most prestigious event, the Rose Bowl Game, "The Granddaddy of Them All," that will take place on Jan. 1. Well at least we know half of it.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: LA Galaxy hold off New York Red Bulls to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: Joseph Paintsil and Dejan Joveljic scored in the first half, and the LA Galaxy won their record sixth MLS Cup championship with a 2-1 victory over the New York Red Bulls on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Haliburton scores 23 points as the Pacers beat the Bulls 132-123
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyrese Haliburton had 23 points and eight assists, and the Indiana Pacers stopped a four-game slide with a 132-123 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night. Pascal Siakam scored 21 points for Indiana, and Bennedict Mathurin finished with 19.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A Rays move to Ybor City could still be possible
item.description: For months, the Tampa Bay Rays celebrated the signing of a deal between their group, the city of St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas County Commission.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Belichick, Marcus Freeman among favorites to be the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, oddsmakers say
item.description: Former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick and current Chicago Bears interim head coach Thomas Brown are among the early favorites to be the Bears' next head coach, according to sports gambling outlets.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
